cards.title: User Authentication - Sign Up
cards.description: As a customer I want to sign up so that I can create an account.

cards.title: User Authentication - Login
cards.description: As a customer I want to log in so that I can access my profile.

cards.title: Service Discovery - View Categories
cards.description: As a customer I want to view service categories so that I can choose a service quickly.

cards.title: Service Discovery - Search by Location
cards.description: As a customer I want to search services by location so that I can find nearby providers.

cards.title: Payment Integration
cards.description: As a customer I want to make a payment so that I can confirm my booking.

cards.title: Service Discovery - Filter by Category
cards.description: As a customer I want to filter services by category so that I can narrow results.

cards.title: Booking Flow - Submit Request
cards.description: As a customer I want to submit a booking request so that I can schedule a service.

cards.title: Booking Flow - Choose Date and Time
cards.description: As a customer I want to choose a date and time so that I can plan around availability.

cards.title: User Authentication - Reset Password
cards.description: As a customer I want to reset my password so that I can recover my account.

cards.title: Booking Flow - Add Notes
cards.description: As a customer I want to add notes to my booking so that I can describe the issue clearly.

cards.title: Home Page Design
cards.description: Create responsive home page with hero section and service categories.

cards.title: Services Page Implementation
cards.description: Build services listing page with filters.

cards.title: Contact Form Setup
cards.description: Build contact page with messaging functionality.
